heading: Net floor area limitations
label: 1594f Net floor area limitations
text: In the construction of housing under the authority of this title and title VIII of the National Housing Act, as amended [ et seq.], the maximum limitations on net floor area for each unit shall be the same as the net floor area limitations prescribed by law (at the time plans and specifications for such construction are begun) for public quarters built with appropriated funds under military construction authority.12 U.S.C. 1748
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, means title IV of , , which enacted sections 1594 and 1594a, 1594b to 1594f of this title, amended sections 1720, 1748, and 1748a to 1748g of Title 12, Banks and Banking, and enacted provisions set out as a note under .act Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 78369 Stat. 646section 1748 of Title 12The National Housing Act, referred to in text, is , . Title VIII of the National Housing Act is classified generally to subchapter VIII (§ 1748 et seq.) of chapter 13 of Title 12, Banks and Banking. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act June 27, 1934, ch. 84748 Stat. 1246section 1701 of Title 12
